title: versioning — bootstrap ApiVersion seed
description: Bootstrap the initial platform API version at deploy time. Only one row: v1 in state=released, is_default=true. Later versions are created via `versioning:release` command, not via seed.

versions.name: v1 (Initial Release)
versions.description:
The first stable API version. All REST endpoints (`/api/v1/...`), all webhook payloads, and the initial GraphQL schema converge on this version.

See [/docs/api/v1](https://docs.stackra.com/api/v1) for reference.
